assignments.label: Assign Finance Queue Id to Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Investment_Strategy_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Investment & Strategy Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Lease_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Lease Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Management_Screen_Inputs_To_Variables_With_Assets_Assemblies
assignments.label: Assign Management Screen Inputs To Variables With Assets & Assemblies

assignments.description: Assign to Assets variable on all Tickets
assignments.name: Assign_Non_Carlyle_MSN
assignments.label: Assign Non Carlyle MSN

assignments.name: Assign_Output_Values_To_Flow_Collections
assignments.label: Assign Output Values To Flow Collections

assignments.name: Assign_Portfolio_Fund_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Portfolio & Fund Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Record_Type_to_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Record Type to Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Tech_Ops_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Tech Ops Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Technical_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Technical Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Ticket_Values_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Ticket Values To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_To_Collection_Variable
assignments.label: Assign To Collection Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Trading_Asset_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Trading & Asset Queue Id To Variable

assignments.description: Create a Ticket Assignee record for each Assignee inputted in the previous screen. Increment the inner loop counter.
assignments.name: Assign_Values_To_Assignee_Variables
assignments.label: Assign Values To Assignee Variables

assignments.description: Create a clone of the parent ticket and overwirte the comment to reflect edits made on the previous screen
assignments.name: Assign_Values_To_Sub_Tickets
assignments.label: Assign Values To Sub-Tickets

assignments.description: Clear variables from buttons or other lists on which flow decisions get based. Allow for re-running of flow.
assignments.name: Clear_Populate_Navigation_Variables
assignments.label: Clear / Populate Navigation Variables

assignments.description: Create a master list of tickets to which Assets, Assemblies and Content Documents can be attached
assignments.name: Combine_Main_Ticket_and_Sub_Tickets_Into_One_List
assignments.label: Combine Main Ticket and Sub Tickets Into One List

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Assign_To_Collection_Variable
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Assign To Collection Variable

assignments.name: Increment_Inner_Loop
assignments.label: Increment Inner Loop

assignments.name: Set_Assets_Attached_Flag_To_False
assignments.label: Set Assets Attached Flag To False

assignments.name: Set_Assets_Attached_Flag_To_True
assignments.label: Set Assets Attached Flag To True

assignments.name: Set_Assignee_On_Main_Ticket
assignments.label: Set Assignee On Main Ticket

assignments.name: Set_Content_Document_Name_and_Id_Collections_To_Null_Filtered_VAlues
assignments.label: Set Content Document Name and Id Collections To Null Filtered VAlues

assignments.description: Increment the outer loop counter and reset the inner loop counter
assignments.name: Set_Loop_Counters
assignments.label: Set Loop Counters

assignments.name: Set_Selected_Attachments_To_Add
assignments.label: Set Selected Attachments To Add

assignments.name: Set_Selected_Attachments_To_Remove
assignments.label: Set Selected Attachments To Remove

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Nulls_Out_Of_Content_Document_Id_Collection
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Nulls Out Of Content Document Id Collection

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Nulls_Out_Of_Content_Document_Name_Collection
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Nulls Out Of Content Document Name Collection

decisions.name: Are_Assets_Either_Attached_Or_Not_Required
decisions.label: Are Assets Either Attached Or Not Required?

decisions.description: If the loop counters hold the same value, the sub-ticket record Id can be set to the Assignee record
decisions.name: Are_Outer_And_Inner_Loop_Counters_The_Same
decisions.label: Are Outer And Inner Loop Counters The Same?

decisions.name: Assets_To_Attach_Collection_Variable_Populated
decisions.label: Assets To Attach Collection Variable Populated?

decisions.description: If user assigned the ticket, build an assignee variable. Otherwise, skip.
decisions.name: Did_User_Enter_Assignee_For_Thsi_Sub_Ticket
decisions.label: Did User Enter Assignee For Thsi Sub-Ticket?

decisions.description: If user set an assignee, then
decisions.name: Did_User_Enter_Assigneee_For_Main_Ticket
decisions.label: Did User Enter Assigneee For Main Ticket?

decisions.name: Is_Non_Carlyle_Asset_or_Fleet_Wide
decisions.label: Is Non Carlyle Asset or Fleet Wide?

rules.name: Yes_Non_Carlyle_Asset_Fleet_Wide
rules.label: Yes - Non Carlyle Asset / Fleet Wide

decisions.description: If user is Lease Management or Sys Admin, they should be able to select the Lease Management record type. Otherwise, it should be hidden.
decisions.name: Is_User_Lease_Management_or_Sys_Admin
decisions.label: Is User Lease Management or Sys Admin?

rules.name: Yes_Lease_Management_or_Sys_Admin
rules.label: Yes - Lease Management or Sys Admin

decisions.description: If user selected to add/remove Assets, Assemblies, or Contracts, send down a path to execute that logic. Otherwise, go on to create ticket.
decisions.name: Manage_Attachments_Or_Create_Ticket
decisions.label: Manage Attachments Or Create Ticket?

decisions.description: Manual navigation ensuring when the Previous button is clicked on the Ticket management screen, the user is always returned to the TicketCreationInputScreen
decisions.name: Return_To_Previous_Screen
decisions.label: Return To Previous Screen?

rules.name: Data_Quality_Request_System_Enhancement_Request
rules.label: Data Quality Request / System Enhancement Request

Flow.description: Flow guides users on the creation of Tickets and Sub-Tickets. Allows users to multi-attach Assets, Assemblies, Assignees and Files.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: All active users in the org
dynamicChoiceSets.name: rcs_ActiveUsers

formulas.description: Dynamically queries Assemblies that are attached to the Asset referenced in the Serial Number input box.
formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c, leaseworks__Engine_Type_Variant__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "LIMIT 3",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c, leaseworks__Engine_Type_Variant__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "LIMIT 3" )

formulas.name: f_AssetInputValid
formulas.expression:
OR(
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = True, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset_MSN__c} != Null )
,
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} != Null, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = False
) )

formulas.description: Dynamic SOQL query to return assets that correspond to the Serial Number entered on the Ticker Management screen
formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c, Transaction_Code__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c LIMIT 1", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c, Transaction_Code__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' LIMIT 1" )

formulas.name: f_AssetsRequired
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_System_Enhancement_Request' || {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'Lease_Management' || ( {!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_Data_Quality_Request' && NOT( CONTAINS({!Object}, 'Asset') ) && NOT( CONTAINS({!Object}, 'Assembly') ) ), False, True )

formulas.description: Formula returns either the Assigneee Instruction for the main ticket or a blank string. Used for amending assignee instructions to comments if imputted.
formulas.name: f_AssigneeInstructionOrBlankMainTicket

formulas.description: If user has inputted asignee instructions for this loop through sub-ticket creation inputs, the instruction is returned by this formula. Otherwise, a blank string is returned.
formulas.name: f_AssigneeInstructionsOrBlankSubTicket
f_AttachedContractsOrPlaceholder
formulas.expression: IF({!Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection} != Null, SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Create_Contracts_To_Attach_Name_Collection}, "[", ""), "]", ""), ",", ", "), "No Contracts on Ticket" )

formulas.name: f_ContractsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number_Contracts}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c FROM leaseworks__Lease__c LIMIT 4", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Lease__c " & "WHERE pro_Asset_Name__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number_Contracts} & "%' " & "LIMIT 4" )

formulas.description: Includes current File upload selections along with selections on previous visit to the screen.
formulas.name: f_FileSelectedForUpload
f_MiddleSectionTitleDynamic
formulas.expression: IF({!Get_Record_Type.DeveloperName} = 'pro_System_Enhancement_Request', 'Business Case & Security Considerations', 'Link Ticket To Records')

formulas.name: f_QueryRelatedAssemblies
formulas.expression: "SELECT Name, Id, leaseworks__Type__c, leaseworks__Last_CSN_Utilization__c, leaseworks__Last_TSN_Utilization__c, leaseworks__Comments__c FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c WHERE leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__c = '" & {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} & "'"

formulas.name: f_QueryRelatedUtilizations
formulas.expression: "SELECT Name, Id, leaseworks__Month_Ending__c, leaseworks__Airframe_Cycles_Landing_During_Month__c, leaseworks__Airframe_Flight_Hours_Month__c, leaseworks__Engineering_Modifications_or_Changes__c FROM leaseworks__Utilization_Report__c WHERE leaseworks__Aircraft__c = '" & {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} & "' ORDER BY leaseworks__Month_Ending__c DESC"

formulas.name: f_RemoveAssetsInstructionText
formulas.expression: IF(ISBLANK({!Create_Assets_To_Attach_Name_Collection}) && ISBLANK({!Create_Assemblies_To_Attach_Name_Collection}), 'No Assets or Assemblies on Ticket', 'Select the desired Assets or Assemblies from the datatables then click ' )

formulas.description: Input variable for autolaunched flow to add / remove ticket attachments
formulas.name: f_varActionInputVariable

Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Create New Ticket

loops.description: Loop through repeater items to match each assignee user to the appropriate sub-ticket
loops.name: Inner_Loop_Repeater_Items
loops.label: Inner Loop Repeater Items

loops.description: Loop through the variable populated by the repeater
loops.name: Loop_Repeater_Items
loops.label: Loop Repeater Items

loops.description: Loop through sub-tickets to match their record id to an assignee record
loops.name: Outer_Loop_Sub_Tickets
loops.label: Outer Loop Sub-Tickets

recordLookups.name: Get_Ticket_Record_Types_Excl_Lease_Management
recordLookups.label: Get Ticket Record Types Excl. Lease Management

recordLookups.name: Get_Ticket_Record_Types_Incl_Lease_Management
recordLookups.label: Get Ticket Record Types Incl. Lease Management

recordUpdates.name: Update_Tickets_With_Assets_and_Assemblies_Strings
recordUpdates.label: Update Tickets With Assets and Assemblies Strings

recordUpdates.description: Populate the Assets field with the Non Carlyle Asset MSN for Tickets with Non Carlyle Asset checked true
recordUpdates.name: Update_Tickets_With_Non_Carlyle_MSN
recordUpdates.label: Update Tickets With Non Carlyle MSN

fields.name: NoAssetsError
fields.fieldText: At least one Asset must be attached to this Ticket.

fields.name: AttachedAssetsAssembliesDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Assets: {!f_AttachedAssetsOrPlaceholder}

Assemblies: {!f_AttachedAssembliesOrPlaceholder}

fields.name: AddAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Search a serial number, select Assets or Assemblies in the datatables and click the button Add.

fields.name: AssetsAndAssembliesNotRequired
fields.fieldText: Assets / Assemblies are not required for this Ticket type.

fields.name: RemoveAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: {!f_RemoveAssetsInstructionText}{!f_RemoveAssetsAssembliesButtonLabelOrBlank}

fields.name: AddContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Enter a serial number to search for any Contract. Select the desired Contracts in the datatable and click the button Add.

fields.name: RemoveContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Select the desired Contracts from the datatable then click Remove

fields.name: AssignTicketInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Optionally assign this Ticket to a User along with an instruction for the assignee.

fields.name: CreateSubTickets
fields.fieldText:
Optionally create one or more Sub-Tickets that clone all the information from your Ticket. Click Add to create more Sub-Tickets


﻿Set an assignee and an instruction for each Sub-Ticket.

fields.name: TicketCreationInputScreenTitle
fields.fieldText:
{!Select_a_Ticket_type}


Information

fields.name: Current_Challenge_Pain_Point_what_is_not_working_today
fields.fieldText: Current Challenge / Pain Point (what is not working today?)

fields.name: Expected_Outcome_time_saved_risk_reduction_compliance_revenue
fields.fieldText: Expected Outcome (time saved, risk reduction, compliance, revenue)

subflows.description: This sub-flow prepares lists of Asset on Ticket, Assembly on Ticket, Content Document Link records to be created.
subflows.name: Prepare_Variables_To_Attach_To_Tickets_And_Sub_Tickets
subflows.label: Prepare Variables To Attach To Tickets And Sub-Tickets

subflows.name: Update_Assignee_Role_Lookups_On_Ticket
subflows.label: Update Assignee Role Lookups On Ticket

textTemplates.description: Text template amends Assigneee Instructions to the comments on the main Ticket. Used as the value for Comments fields on sub-tickets.
textTemplates.name: tt_AssigneeInstructionsWithComment

variables.description: Assemblies selected to be attached to the Ticket
variables.name: varAssembliesToAttach

variables.description: Gets set to true when the varAssetsToAttach collection contains records. Gets set to false when all records removed from the collection.
variables.name: varAssetsAttached

variables.description: Assets selected to be attached to the Ticket
variables.name: varAssetsToAttach

variables.description: A placeholder variable to contain the comments from the TicketCreationInputScreen
variables.name: varCommentsPlaceholder

variables.description: Variable for setting default value on Serial Number input component.
variables.name: varSerialNumberDefault

variables.description: Tickets to update Assets field with Non Carlyle MSN
variables.name: varTicketsToUpdate
